title: SourceProvenance
description: Envelope describing where a record came from and its licensing posture. Every normalized record must carry one of these.

source_id.description: Machine id of the adapter that produced the record (e.g. 'theracingapi', 'sample_manual', 'unofficial_nyra').

source_url.description: Public URL describing the source or its ToS page.

license_tier.description: green=open/permitted; yellow=licensed via paid agreement; red=prohibited; sample_manual_review=hand-curated for UI dev, excluded from training; unknown=provenance lost, excluded from training.

license_notes.description: Free-text note, e.g. 'Racing API ToS permits data analysis + app use; email confirm before deploy.'

training_eligible.description: Whether this record is cleared for ML training output. Defaults to false unless explicitly approved.

display_eligible.description: Whether this record is cleared for in-app display.

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the adapter produced this record.

raw_payload_hash.description: SHA-256 of the raw upstream bytes, for dedup and audit.
